A

addLabel(String) - Method in class com.falkordb.graph_entities.Node
Adds a label to the node.
addProperty(Property) - Method in class com.falkordb.graph_entities.GraphEntity
Add a property to the entity
addProperty(String, Object) - Method in class com.falkordb.graph_entities.GraphEntity
Adds a property to the entity, by composing name, type and value to a property object

B

build() - Method in class com.falkordb.FalkorDB.Builder
Validates the configuration and builds a driver.
builder() - Static method in class com.falkordb.FalkorDB
Starts building a driver with a fluent, discoverable configuration API — a superset of the driver(...) factories that also exposes TLS, connection-pool sizing, and timeouts.

C

CACHED_EXECUTION - Enum constant in enum com.falkordb.Statistics.Label
Whether the execution was cached.
cachedExecution() - Method in interface com.falkordb.Statistics
Returns whether the execution was cached.

Invokes stored procedures without arguments
callProcedure(String) - Method in interface com.falkordb.GraphPipeline
Invokes stored procedures without arguments

Invokes stored procedures without arguments

Invokes stored procedure with arguments

Invokes stored procedure with arguments
callProcedure(String, List<String>) - Method in interface com.falkordb.GraphTransaction
Invokes stored procedure with arguments
callProcedure(String, List<String>, Map<String, List<String>>) - Method in interface com.falkordb.Graph
Invoke a stored procedure
callProcedure(String, List<String>, Map<String, List<String>>) - Method in interface com.falkordb.GraphPipeline
Invoke a stored procedure
callProcedure(String, List<String>, Map<String, List<String>>) - Method in interface com.falkordb.GraphTransaction
Invoke a stored procedure
clear() - Method in interface com.falkordb.GraphTransaction
If object is in transaction mode, flushes all previously queued commands in a transaction and restores the connection state to normal
close() - Method in interface com.falkordb.Graph

COLUMN_RELATION - Enum constant in enum com.falkordb.Header.ResultSetColumnTypes

configGet(String) - Method in interface com.falkordb.Driver
Gets the value of a FalkorDB configuration parameter.
configSet(String, Object) - Method in interface com.falkordb.Driver
Sets the value of a FalkorDB configuration parameter.
connectionTimeout(Duration) - Method in class com.falkordb.FalkorDB.Builder
Sets the connection (connect) timeout (default 2000 ms).
containsKey(String) - Method in interface com.falkordb.Record
Check if the record header contains the given key
copyGraph(String) - Method in interface com.falkordb.Graph
Copies the graph
copyGraph(String) - Method in interface com.falkordb.GraphPipeline
Copies the graph
credentials(String) - Method in class com.falkordb.FalkorDB.Builder
Sets a password for password-only (default user) authentication, clearing any previously set username.
credentials(String, String) - Method in class com.falkordb.FalkorDB.Builder
Sets the username and password used to authenticate.

deleteGraph() - Method in interface com.falkordb.Graph
Deletes the entire graph

Deletes the entire graph

Graph - Interface in com.falkordb
An interface for a FalkorDB graph.
GraphContext - Interface in com.falkordb
An interface for a FalkorDB graph with context.
GraphContextGenerator - Interface in com.falkordb
An interface for generating a FalkorDB graph with context.
GraphEntity - Class in com.falkordb.graph_entities
This is an abstract class for representing a graph entity.
GraphEntity() - Constructor for class com.falkordb.graph_entities.GraphEntity
Default constructor.
GraphEntity(int) - Constructor for class com.falkordb.graph_entities.GraphEntity
Use this constructor to reduce memory allocations when properties are added to the edge
GraphException - Exception Class in com.falkordb.exceptions
Graph query evaluation exception.
GraphException(String) - Constructor for exception class com.falkordb.exceptions.GraphException
Creates a GraphException with the given error message.
GraphException(String, Throwable) - Constructor for exception class com.falkordb.exceptions.GraphException
Creates a GraphException with the given error message and cause.
GraphException(Throwable) - Constructor for exception class com.falkordb.exceptions.GraphException
Creates a GraphException with the given cause.
GraphPipeline - Interface in com.falkordb
An interface which aligned to Jedis Pipeline interface
GraphTransaction - Interface in com.falkordb
An interface which aligned to Jedis transactional interface

Path - Class in com.falkordb.graph_entities
This class represents a path in the graph.

pipelined() - Method in interface com.falkordb.GraphContext
Returns a Redis pipeline object, over the connection context, with graph API capabilities
Point - Class in com.falkordb.graph_entities
This class represents a (geographical) point in the graph.
Point(double, double) - Constructor for class com.falkordb.graph_entities.Point
Creates a point from a latitude and longitude in degrees.
Point(List<Double>) - Constructor for class com.falkordb.graph_entities.Point
Creates a point from a two-element [latitude, longitude] list.
poolMaxIdle(int) - Method in class com.falkordb.FalkorDB.Builder
Sets the maximum number of idle connections kept in the pool (default 8).
poolMaxTotal(int) - Method in class com.falkordb.FalkorDB.Builder
Sets the maximum connection-pool size (default 8).
poolMaxWait(Duration) - Method in class com.falkordb.FalkorDB.Builder
Sets the maximum time to wait for a connection when the pool is exhausted (default: wait indefinitely).
port(int) - Method in class com.falkordb.FalkorDB.Builder
Sets the server port (default 6379).
profile(String) - Method in interface com.falkordb.Graph
Execute a Cypher query and produce an execution plan augmented with metrics for each operation's execution.
profile(String) - Method in interface com.falkordb.GraphPipeline
Execute a Cypher query and produce an execution plan augmented with metrics for each operation's execution.
profile(String) - Method in interface com.falkordb.GraphTransaction
Execute a Cypher query and produce an execution plan augmented with metrics for each operation's execution.

Execute a Cypher query with parameters and produce an execution plan augmented with metrics for each operation's execution.

Execute a Cypher query with parameters and produce an execution plan augmented with metrics for each operation's execution.
profile(String, Map<String, Object>) - Method in interface com.falkordb.GraphTransaction
Execute a Cypher query with parameters and produce an execution plan augmented with metrics for each operation's execution.

size() - Method in interface com.falkordb.Record
The number of fields in this record
size() - Method in interface com.falkordb.ResultSet
Returns the number of records in the result set.
socketTimeout(Duration) - Method in class com.falkordb.FalkorDB.Builder
Sets the socket (read) timeout (default Duration.ZERO = no read deadline, so a long-running server query is never cut off client-side).
ssl(boolean) - Method in class com.falkordb.FalkorDB.Builder
Enables or disables TLS (default false).
Statistics - Interface in com.falkordb
An interface for the statistics of a result set.
Statistics.Label - Enum in com.falkordb
Different Statistics labels
sync() - Method in interface com.falkordb.GraphPipeline
Synchronize pipeline by reading all responses.
syncAndReturnAll() - Method in interface com.falkordb.GraphPipeline
Synchronize pipeline by reading all responses.

W

waitReplicas(int, long) - Method in interface com.falkordb.GraphPipeline
Blocks until all the previous write commands are successfully transferred and acknowledged by at least the specified number of replicas.
watch(String...) - Method in interface com.falkordb.GraphContext
Perform watch over given Redis keys (Graphs names)
